finalDetermination: The remaining Community Pulse authoritative-signature instability was routeWatchIdle changing while routeWatchActivated was false. That idle/standby bit is equivalent and non-authoritative for Community Pulse content when Route Watch is not active.
whyV738StillMissed: V738 excluded timestamp freshness fields and rounded coordinates, but the authoritative signature still included routeWatchIdle as a raw boolean. Warm refreshes can flip idle/standby bookkeeping while Route Watch is not activated, causing cache_miss_authoritative_signature_changed without Community Pulse content changing.
patchApplied: Normalize routeWatchIdle in the V734 Community Pulse reuse signature so it can only be true when routeWatchActivated is true.
